mapper.select:
SELECT TPWP.ID, TPWP.PLAN_TYPE, TPWP.COMPANY_ID, TPWP.MASS_NAMES_SOURCE, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_FRONT, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_BACK, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_ASSIST, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_RESHIPMENT, TPWP.COMPANY_NAME, TPWP.EXAMINE_BY, TPWP.WORK_DATE, TPWP.CLASS_CODE, TPWP.CLASS_NAME, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, CASE WHEN TPWP.SHIPVOYAGE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR (TDS.SHIP_NAME) || '_' || TO_CHAR (TDSI.VOYAGE) END SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, MS.HATCH_NUM, TPWP.PLAN_NO, TPWP.PROCESS_CODE, TPWP.PROCESS_NAME, TPWP.DEPT_NAME, TPWP.QUANTITY_PLAN, TPWP.TON_PLAN, TPWP.START_TIME_PLAN, TPWP.END_TIME_PLAN, TPWP.START_WORK_TIME, TPWP.END_WORK_TIME, TPWP.REMARK, TPWP.STATUS, MC.NM STATUS_LABEL, TPWP.BERTH_NAME, TPWP.FRONT_TALLY_BY_NAME, TPWP.BACK_TALLY_BY_NAME, TPWP.DISPATCH_BY_NAME, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_FRONT, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_BACK, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_ASSIST, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_RESHIPMENT, T6.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, T7.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, T8.CARGO_NAME, T8.CARGO_CODE, T5.TRUST_NO, T2.NUM AS LABOR_NUM, CASE WHEN TPWT.ID IS NULL THEN '待审核' ELSE TO_CHAR( TPWT.WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME ) END WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME, CASE WHEN LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( TPWT. TICKET_TYPE ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY TPWT. TICKET_TYPE ) IS NULL THEN '待签票' WHEN LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( TPWT. TICKET_TYPE ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY TPWT. TICKET_TYPE ) = '1' THEN '调度已签票' WHEN LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( TPWT. TICKET_TYPE ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY TPWT. TICKET_TYPE ) = '2' THEN '库场已签票' ELSE '调度/库场已签票' END IS_SIGNED
FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TPWP.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS. ID LEFT JOIN M_SHIP MS ON TDS.SHIP_ID = MS. ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TPWP.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI. ID JOIN M_CONSTANTS MC ON TPWP.STATUS = MC.CD AND MC.TYPE_CD = 'WORK_PLAN_STATUS' LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT ON TPWP. ID = TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST T5 ON TPWP.TRUST_ID = T5. ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR (CARGO_OWNER_NAME), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CARGO_OWNER_NAME), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TRUST_ID, REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR (CARGO_OWNER_ID), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CARGO_OWNER_ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) CARGO_OWNER_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO GROUP BY TRUST_ID ) T6 ON T5. ID = T6.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(CARGO_NAME), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CARGO_NAME), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) CARGO_NAME, REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(CARGO_CODE), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CARGO_CODE), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) CARGO_CODE, TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO GROUP BY TRUST_ID ) T8 ON T5. ID = T8.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR (CARGO_AGENT_NAME), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CARGO_AGENT_NAME), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO GROUP BY TRUST_ID ) T7 ON T5. ID = T7.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_PRD_DISPATCH T2 ON TPWP. ID = T2.WORK_PLAN_ID AND T2.DISPATCH_TYPE = '2' WHERE TPWP.STATUS != 10 AND TPWP.ID = #{workPlanId} GROUP BY TPWP.ID, TPWP.PLAN_TYPE, TPWP.COMPANY_ID, TPWP.MASS_NAMES_SOURCE, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_FRONT, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_BACK, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_ASSIST, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_RESHIPMENT, TPWP.COMPANY_NAME, TPWP.EXAMINE_BY, TPWP.WORK_DATE, TPWP.CLASS_CODE, TPWP.CLASS_NAME, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, CASE WHEN TPWP.SHIPVOYAGE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR (TDS.SHIP_NAME) || '_' || TO_CHAR (TDSI.VOYAGE) END, MS.HATCH_NUM, TPWP.PLAN_NO, TPWP.PROCESS_CODE, TPWP.PROCESS_NAME, TPWP.DEPT_NAME, TPWP.QUANTITY_PLAN, TPWP.TON_PLAN, TPWP.START_TIME_PLAN, TPWP.END_TIME_PLAN, TPWP.START_WORK_TIME, TPWP.END_WORK_TIME, TPWP.REMARK, TPWP.STATUS, MC.NM, TPWP.BERTH_NAME, TPWP.FRONT_TALLY_BY_NAME, TPWP.BACK_TALLY_BY_NAME, TPWP.DISPATCH_BY_NAME, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_FRONT, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_BACK, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_ASSIST, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_RESHIPMENT, T6.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, T7.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, T8.CARGO_NAME, T8.CARGO_CODE, T5.TRUST_NO, T2.NUM, CASE WHEN TPWT.ID IS NULL THEN '待审核' ELSE TO_CHAR( TPWT.WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME ) END ORDER BY PLAN_NO

SELECT ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, DIRECTION, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TPDS.DEPT_ID, TPDS.DEPT_NAME FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY TPDS JOIN SYS_DEPT SD ON TPDS.DEPT_ID = SD.ID WHERE TPDS.DISPATCH_TYPE = '2' AND TPDS.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TPDS.DEPT_ID, TPDS.DEPT_NAME

SELECT TPWP.ID, TPWP.COMPANY_ID, TPWP.COMPANY_NAME, TPWP.WORK_DATE, TPWP.CLASS_CODE, TPWP.CLASS_NAME, TPWP.TRUST_ID, TPWP.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TPWP.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TPWP.HATCH, TPWP.PLAN_NO, TPWP.PLAN_TYPE, TPWP.PROCESS_CODE, TPWP.PROCESS_NAME, TPWP.WORK_CONTENT, TPWP.DEPT_ID, TPWP.DEPT_NAME, TPWP.QUANTITY_PLAN, TPWP.TON_PLAN, TPWP.START_TIME_PLAN, TPWP.END_TIME_PLAN, TPWP.START_WORK_TIME, TPWP.END_WORK_TIME, TPWP.REMARK, TPWP.STATUS, TPWP.BERTH_ID, TPWP.BERTH_NAME, TPWP.FRONT_TALLY_BY, TPWP.FRONT_TALLY_BY_NAME, TPWP.BACK_TALLY_BY, TPWP.BACK_TALLY_BY_NAME, TPWP.DISPATCH_BY, TPWP.DISPATCH_BY_NAME, TPWP.CREATE_BY, TPWP.CREATE_BY_NAME, TPWP.CREATE_TIME, TPWP.UPDATE_BY, TPWP.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TPWP.UPDATE_TIME, TPWP.EXAMINE_BY, TPWP.EXAMINE_BY_NAME, TPWP.EXAMINE_TIME, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_FRONT, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_BACK, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_ASSIST, TPWP.EQUIPMENT_NAMES_RESHIPMENT, TPWP.MASS_NAMES_SOURCE, TPWP.MASS_NAMES_TARGET, TPWP.RESHIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, TPWP.BUS_CARGO_INFO_ID, TPWP.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TPWP.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TPWP.cargo_code, TPWP.cargo_name, TDSI.IS_ADJUST, TDSI.IS_ADJUST_LABOR FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP left join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on TPWP.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID left join T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI on TDSI.ID = TBT.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID WHERE TPWP.ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_WORK_TICKET(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, WORK_PLAN_ID, TYPE, WORK_TICKET_STATUS, WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME,WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME,DEPT_ID,DEPT_NAME,QUANTITY,TON,TICKET_TYPE,SOURE,IS_OLD) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workTicketStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workTicketStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{ticketType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{soure,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{isOld,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT ALL
INTO T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL(ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_INFO_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, TARGET_CARGO_INFO_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, PIECE_WORK_TEAM_ID, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME,SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID,HATCH,STOREHOUSE_ID_SOURCE,STOREHOUSE_NAME_SOURCE, REGION_ID_SOURCE, REGION_NAME_SOURCE, MASS_ID_SOURCE, MASS_NAME_SOURCE,STOREHOUSE_ID_TARGET, STOREHOUSE_NAME_TARGET, REGION_ID_TARGET, REGION_NAME_TARGET, MASS_ID_TARGET,MASS_NAME_TARGET, CAR_COUNT, QUANTITY, TON, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, WORK_TICKET_ID, WORK_HOUR, START_TIME, END_TIME,GROUP_ID,GROUP_NAME, PERSONNEL_ID,PERSONNEL_NAME,WORK_TON,CABIN_NO,ALLOT_TYPE, WORK_POSITION_CODE,WORK_POSITION_NAME) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.trustCargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.targetCargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processDetailCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processDetailName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.pieceWorkTeamId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.workDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.className, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.hatch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.storehouseIdSource, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.storehouseNameSource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.regionIdSource, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.regionNameSource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.massIdSource, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.massNameSource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.storehouseIdTarget, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.storehouseNameTarget, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.regionIdTarget, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.regionNameTarget, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.massIdTarget, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.massNameTarget, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.carCount, jdbcType=INTEGER},#{entity.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.workTicketId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.workHour,jdbcType=INTEGER}, to_date(#{entity.startTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'), to_date(#{entity.endTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi'), #{entity.groupId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.groupName, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.pieceWorkTeamId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.pieceWorkTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.workTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{entity.cabinNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.allotType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.workPositionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.workPositionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT(ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.workTicketDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.equipmentTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.equipmentTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.equipmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.equipmentNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_LABOR(ID, WORK_TICKET_ID, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, TON, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.workTicketId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, WORK_PLAN_ID, TYPE, WORK_TICKET_STATUS, WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, QUANTITY, TON FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET WHERE is_old = '0' and WORK_PLAN_ID = #{planId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND TICKET_TYPE = #{ticketType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND WORK_TICKET_STATUS = #{workTicketStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_STORAGE_YARD(ID, PARENT_ID, STORAGE_YARD_NM, SHORT_CD, AREA, STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD, IS_INNER_STORAGE_YARD, UNIT_AREA_TON, IS_RENT, WORK_AREA_CD, SORT_NUM, STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME,BHT_ID) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storageYardNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shortCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{area, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{storageYardTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isInnerStorageYard, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitAreaTon, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{isRent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workAreaCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{storageYardLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},STORAGE_YARD.nextval)
mapper.select: SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_INFO_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, TARGET_CARGO_INFO_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, PIECE_WORK_TEAM_ID, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, SPEC_CODE, SPEC_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, HATCH, STOREHOUSE_ID_SOURCE, STOREHOUSE_NAME_SOURCE, REGION_ID_SOURCE, REGION_NAME_SOURCE, MASS_ID_SOURCE, MASS_NAME_SOURCE, STOREHOUSE_ID_TARGET, STOREHOUSE_NAME_TARGET, REGION_ID_TARGET, REGION_NAME_TARGET, MASS_ID_TARGET, MASS_NAME_TARGET, CAR_COUNT, QUANTITY, TON, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, WORK_HOUR, TO_CHAR(START_TIME,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') START_TIME, TO_CHAR(END_TIME,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') END_TIME, GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, PERSONNEL_ID, PERSONNEL_NAME, WORK_TON, CABIN_NO, allot_type FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL WHERE WORK_TICKET_ID = #{workTicketId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_INFO_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, TARGET_CARGO_INFO_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, PIECE_WORK_TEAM_ID, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, SPEC_CODE, SPEC_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, HATCH, STOREHOUSE_ID_SOURCE, STOREHOUSE_NAME_SOURCE, REGION_ID_SOURCE, REGION_NAME_SOURCE, MASS_ID_SOURCE, MASS_NAME_SOURCE, STOREHOUSE_ID_TARGET, STOREHOUSE_NAME_TARGET, REGION_ID_TARGET, REGION_NAME_TARGET, MASS_ID_TARGET, MASS_NAME_TARGET, CAR_COUNT, QUANTITY, TON, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, WORK_HOUR, TO_CHAR(START_TIME,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') START_TIME, TO_CHAR(END_TIME,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') END_TIME, GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, WORK_TON FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL WHERE WORK_TICKET_ID = #{workTicketId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND GROUP_ID = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT WHERE WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID IN
#{workTicketDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, WORK_TICKET_ID, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, TON, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_LABOR WHERE WORK_TICKET_ID = #{workTicketId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT WHERE WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID IN
#{workTicketDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_PRD_WORK_TICKET SET COMPANY_ID = #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TYPE = #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_CODE = #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_NAME = #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_DATE = #{workDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CLASS_CODE = #{classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLASS_NAME = #{className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, TON = #{ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND TICKET_TYPE = #{ticketType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE T_PRD_WORK_TICKET SET WORK_TICKET_STATUS = #{workTicketStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME = #{workTicketStatusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND TICKET_TYPE = #{ticketType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PIECE_PROJECT_CODE, PIECE_PROJECT_NAME, IS_UPDATE_STORAGE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_PIECE_WORK_TEAM WHERE ID IN
#{pieceWorkTeamId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, WORK_TYPE, TALLY, CARGO_COLOR, SORT_NUM, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SHORTHAND_CODE, UPDATE_POINT FROM M_CARGO WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CARGO_CODE IN
#{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_ATTENDANCE WHERE WORK_DATE = #{workDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND CLASS_CODE = #{classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DEPT_ID IN
#{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, ATTENDANCE_ID, USER_ID, USER_NAME, COEFFICIENT, ISWORK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_ATTENDANCE_USER WHERE ISWORK = '是' AND COEFFICIENT != 0 AND ATTENDANCE_ID IN
#{attendanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT DEPT_ID "deptId",DEPT_NAME "deptName" FROM T_PRD_ATTENDANCE WHERE ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT A2.TRUST_NO FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN A1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST A2 ON A2.ID = A1.TRUST_ID WHERE A1.ID = ( SELECT WORK_PLAN_ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
SELECT A2.TRUST_NO FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN A1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST A2 ON A2.ID = A1.TRUST_ID WHERE A1.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND TICKET_TYPE = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(CARGO_CODE), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CARGO_CODE), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "cargoCode", REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(CARGO_NAME), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CARGO_NAME), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "cargoName" FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE TRUST_ID = ( SELECT TRUST_ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN WHERE ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER WHERE IS_STATIONS = 1 AND ID IN
#{id}

SELECT COUNT (*) FROM T_PRD_SALARY WHERE ( WORK_TICKET_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} OR WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL WHERE WORK_TICKET_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} )) AND SALARY_STATUS_CODE = 20

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(TDSI. ID), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TDSI. ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "itemId", REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(TDS. ID), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TDS. ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "id" FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI. ID JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS. ID JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI. ID WHERE TBTC.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(TDSI. ID), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TDSI. ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "itemId", REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(TDS. ID), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TDS. ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "id" FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPW LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TPW.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS. ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TPW.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI. ID WHERE TPW. ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(TDSI. ID), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TDSI. ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "shipVoyageItemId", REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR ( TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP (
ORDER BY TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE ), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "shipVoyage" FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI. ID JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS. ID JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI. ID WHERE TBTC.TRUST_ID = ( SELECT TRUST_ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN WHERE ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG (TO_CHAR(TDSI. ID), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TDSI. ID), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "shipVoyageItemId", REGEXP_REPLACE ( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR ( TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP (
ORDER BY TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE ), '([^,]+)(,\1)*(,|$)', '\1\3' ) "shipVoyage" FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPW LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TPW.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS. ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TPW.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI. ID WHERE TPW. ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_PRD_SALARY(ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PIECE_PROJECT_CODE, PIECE_PROJECT_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, USER_BY, USER_BY_NAME, COEFFICIENT, SALARY_PRICE_ID, PRICE, QUANTITY, TON, AMOUNT, SALARY_STATUS_CODE, SALARY_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, SALARY_SUMMARY_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME,SALARY_TYPE_CODE,SALARY_TYPE_NAME,WORK_TICKET_ID,PROCESS_CODE,PROCESS_NAME,SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID,SHIP_VOYAGE, CARGO_CODE,CARGO_NAME) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.workTicketDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.workDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.pieceProjectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.pieceProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processDetailCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processDetailName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.userBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.userByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.coefficient, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.salaryPriceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.salaryStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.salaryStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.salarySummaryId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.examineBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.examineByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.examineTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{entity.salaryTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.salaryTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.workTicketId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.shipVoyageItemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.shipVoyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE T_PRD_WORK_TICKET SET WORK_TICKET_STATUS = #{workTicketStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME = #{workTicketStatusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_BY = NULL, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = NULL, EXAMINE_TIME = NULL, EXAMINE_BY_UP = #{examineByUp,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXAMINE_BY_NAME_UP = #{examineByNameUp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_TIME_UP = #{examineTimeUp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND TICKET_TYPE = #{ticketType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, PROCESS_CD, PROCESS_NM, SHORT_CD, PROCESS_TYPE_CD, IN_OUT_PORT_TYPE_CD, IS_SELECT_SUBTICKET, IS_MERGE_TICKET, IS_CREATE_TICKET, IS_TAKE, SOURCE_CD, SOURCE_NM, TARGET_CD, TARGET_NM, IS_TALLY_TON, IS_OPERATION_TON, IS_THROUGHPUT, IS_NATURAL_TON, IS_SETTLE, IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD, SORT_NUM, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_CARGO_PACKAGE_CHANGE, PLAN_TYPE_CD, PLAN_TYPE_NM FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD IN
#{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ID, PORT_STORAGE_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, INOUT_TYPE, INOUT_STORAGE_CODE, INOUT_STORAGE_NAME, WORK_TICKET_ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, CARGO_TALLY_ID, CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID, INOUT_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE WORK_TICKET_ID = #{workTicketId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, PORT_STORAGE_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, INOUT_TYPE, INOUT_STORAGE_CODE, INOUT_STORAGE_NAME, WORK_TICKET_ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, CARGO_TALLY_ID, CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID, INOUT_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID IN
#{workTicketDetailId}
SELECT GROUP_ID "groupId", GROUP_NAME "groupName" FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL WHERE WORK_TICKET_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND GROUP_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME

SELECT DEPT_ID, PARENT_ID, DEPT_CODE, DEPT_NAME, ORDER_NO, REMARK, PARENT_IDS, CHIEF, DESCR, DEPT_LEVEL, DEPT_TYPE, DEPT_NO, PARENT_DEPT_CODE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, STATUS, ID, IS_LABOR, IS_MACHINE, IS_PROJECT, IN_OUT_TYPE, IS_WORK_COMPANY, IS_TALLY_COMPANY FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID IN
#{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT A1.DEPT_ID, A1.DEPT_NAME, A2.MAC_TYPE_CODE EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID, A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, A1.SUB_PROCESS_CODE PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, A1.SUB_PROCESS_NAME PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, A3.SORT_NUM, LISTAGG (A1.EQUIPMENT_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.EQUIPMENT_ID) AS EQUIPMENT_ID, LISTAGG (A1.EQUIPMENT_NO, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.EQUIPMENT_NO) AS EQUIPMENT_NO FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY A1 LEFT JOIN M_MACHINE_TYPE A2 ON A2. ID = A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS A3 ON A1.SUB_PROCESS_CODE = A3.PROCESS_CD WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DISPATCH_TYPE = '1'
AND A3.IS_DISPATCH_TALLY = '1'
AND (A3.IS_DISPATCH_TALLY != '1' OR A3.IS_DISPATCH_TALLY IS NULL)
AND (A3.IS_DISPATCH_TALLY_SH = '2')
GROUP BY A1.DEPT_ID, A1.DEPT_NAME, A2.MAC_TYPE_CODE, A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID, A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, A1.SUB_PROCESS_CODE, A1.SUB_PROCESS_NAME, A3.SORT_NUM ORDER BY A3.SORT_NUM, A1.DEPT_ID

SELECT A1.WORK_PLAN_ID, A1.DEPT_ID, A1.DEPT_NAME, A2.MAC_TYPE_CODE EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID, A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, A1.SUB_PROCESS_CODE PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, A1.SUB_PROCESS_NAME PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, LISTAGG (A1.EQUIPMENT_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.EQUIPMENT_ID) AS EQUIPMENT_ID, LISTAGG (A1.EQUIPMENT_NO, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY A1.EQUIPMENT_NO) AS EQUIPMENT_NO FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY A1 LEFT JOIN M_MACHINE_TYPE A2 ON A2. ID = A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS A3 ON A1.SUB_PROCESS_CODE = A3.PROCESS_CD WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID IN
#{item}
AND DISPATCH_TYPE = '1'
AND A3.IS_DISPATCH_TALLY = '1'
AND (A3.IS_DISPATCH_TALLY != '1' OR A3.IS_DISPATCH_TALLY IS NULL)
GROUP BY A1.WORK_PLAN_ID, A1.DEPT_ID, A1.DEPT_NAME, A2.MAC_TYPE_CODE, A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID, A1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, A1.SUB_PROCESS_CODE, A1.SUB_PROCESS_NAME

SELECT DEPT_ID pieceWorkTeamId, DEPT_NAME pieceWorkTeamName FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY WHERE SUB_PROCESS_CODE = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DISPATCH_TYPE = '2' AND WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT DEPT_ID pieceWorkTeamId, DEPT_NAME pieceWorkTeamName, SUB_PROCESS_CODE processDetailCode, WORK_PLAN_ID workPlanId FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY WHERE DISPATCH_TYPE = '2' AND WORK_PLAN_ID IN
#{item}
SELECT A1.DEPT_ID "deptId", A2.DEPT_NAME "deptName" FROM SYS_USER A1 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT A2 ON A2. ID = A1.DEPT_ID WHERE A1. ID = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID "deptId", DEPT_NAME "deptName" FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_NAME,DEPT_LEVEL FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = ( SELECT A1.DEPT_ID FROM SYS_USER A1 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT A2 ON A2. ID = A1.DEPT_ID WHERE A1. ID = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )) CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID=ID) WHERE DEPT_LEVEL = '2'

SELECT ID "deptId", DEPT_NAME "deptName" FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_NAME,DEPT_LEVEL FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = ( SELECT A1.DEPT_ID FROM SYS_USER A1 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT A2 ON A2. ID = A1.DEPT_ID WHERE A1. ID = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )) CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID=ID) WHERE DEPT_LEVEL = '1'

SELECT ID "deptId", DEPT_NAME "deptName" FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_NAME,DEPT_LEVEL FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID=ID) WHERE DEPT_LEVEL = '1'
SELECT IS_TALLY_TON FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processDetailCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT * FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_LEVEL IN (2)
AND TICKET_LEVEL in ('1','2')
AND TICKET_LEVEL = '1'
SELECT * FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE TICKET_LEVEL = '1' AND id = ( SELECT PARENT_ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
SELECT * FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE TICKET_LEVEL = '1' AND PARENT_ID IN ( SELECT PARENT_ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

SELECT PROCESS_CD "processCd" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PARENT_ID = ( SELECT ID FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AND IS_TALLY_TON = '1'
AND IS_DISPATCH_TALLY = '1'
AND (IS_DISPATCH_TALLY != '1' OR IS_DISPATCH_TALLY IS NULL)
AND (IS_DISPATCH_TALLY_SH = '2')
SELECT UPDATE_POINT FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT UPDATE_POINT "updatePoint",IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD "inoutType" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processDetailCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT IS_MEANWHILE FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processDetailCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT IN_OUT_TYPE FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT TICKET_TYPE FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT ID FROM T_PRD_ATTENDANCE WHERE DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND CLASS_CODE = #{classCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND WORK_DATE = #{workDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
SELECT WORK_TYPE FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT COUNT(ROLE_ID) FROM SYS_ROLE_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ${str}

SELECT ID FROM T_PRD_ATTENDANCE WHERE DEPT_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE PARENT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) AND CLASS_CODE = #{classCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND WORK_DATE = #{workDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

SELECT SUM(WEIGHT_GOODS) "ton" FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO A1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO A2 ON A1.PLAN_NO = A2.BUSINESS_NO LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST A3 ON A3. ID = A2.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY A4 ON A4.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = A1.NOTE_ID LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM A5 ON A5.TALLY_ID = A4.ID LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD A6 ON A6.ID = A5.LOCATION_ID WHERE A1.PLAN_NO IN ( SELECT BUSINESS_NO FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}) AND GOODS_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TO_CHAR (WEIGH_OUT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') >= #{startTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TO_CHAR (WEIGH_OUT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') < #{endTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A3. TYPE IN ('集港', '疏港', '陆销') AND WEIGHT_GOODS != 0 AND WEIGHT_GOODS IS NOT NULL AND A4.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND (A6.IS_FRONTIER IS NULL OR A6.IS_FRONTIER = '0')

SELECT tyt.PLAN_ID "workPlanId", TYTI.STOREHOUSE_ID "storehouseId" , TYTI.STOREHOUSE_NAME "storehouseName", TYTI.LOCATION_ID "regionId", TYTI.LOCATION_NO "regionName", TYTI.STACK_POSITION_NAME"massName", TYTI.CARGO_INFO_ID "cargoInfoId", TYTI.STACK_POSITION_ID "massId" FROM T_YARD_TALLY tyt LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM tyti ON tyti.TALLY_ID = TYT.ID WHERE TYT.PLAN_ID IN
#{item} AND TYTI.STOREHOUSE_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TYT.PLAN_ID, TYTI.STOREHOUSE_ID , TYTI.STOREHOUSE_NAME , TYTI.LOCATION_ID , TYTI.LOCATION_NO , TYTI.STACK_POSITION_NAME , TYTI.CARGO_INFO_ID, TYTI.STACK_POSITION_ID

SELECT TO_CHAR (A1.SHIP_NAME) || '_' || TO_CHAR (A2.VOYAGE) "shipNameVoyage", A2.LOAD_UNLOAD "loadUnLoad" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE A1 LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM A2 ON A1. ID = A2.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE A1. ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND A2. ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT CARGO_OWNER_NAME || '/' || CARGO_NAME || '/' || CARGO_INFO_NO CARGO_NAME_LABEL FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT * FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID IN
#{item}

SELECT CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, EXAMINE_TIME, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, WORK_TICKET_STATUS, WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, WORK_PLAN_ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID IN
#{item}

SELECT YARD_SALARY_TYPE_CODE "kcTypeCode", YARD_SALARY_TYPE_NAME "kcTypeName", DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_CODE "ddTypeCode", DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_NAME "ddTypeName", FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_CODE "ljTypeCode", FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_NAME "ljTypeName", FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_CODE "gjTypeCode", FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_NAME "gjTypeName" FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT PARENT_ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT IS_DISPATCH_TALLY FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processDetailCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT ID "deptId", DEPT_NAME "deptName" FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID IN ( SELECT PARENT_ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{pieceWorkTeamId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY WHERE SUB_PROCESS_CODE = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( PROCESS_NM ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY PROCESS_NM) FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PARENT_ID = ( SELECT ID FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AND IS_DISPATCH_TALLY = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT WHERE WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE
SELECT EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT WHERE WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE
SELECT * FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT QUANTITY "quantity",TON "ton",ID "id" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND STOREHOUSE_ID = #{storehouseId} AND REGION_ID = #{regionId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND MASS_ID = #{massId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_WORK_TICKET(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, WORK_PLAN_ID, TYPE, WORK_TICKET_STATUS, WORK_TICKET_STATUS_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, EXAMINE_BY,EXAMINE_BY_NAME,EXAMINE_TIME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME,DEPT_ID,DEPT_NAME,QUANTITY,TON,TICKET_TYPE) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workTicketStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workTicketStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{ticketType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select TYT.PROCESS_CODE PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE,TYT.PROCESS_NAME PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, MWP.PROCESS_CD PROCESS_CODE,MWP.PROCESS_NM PROCESS_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_CODE, TYTI.CARGO_INFO_ID, TBCI.CARGO_NAME||'/'||TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME||'/'||TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO CARGO_INFO_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, tbt.id trust_id, tbt.trust_no, tbtc.id trust_cargo_info_id, TYTI.SOURCE_OR_TARGET_FLAG, sum(TYTI.TON) TON, sum(TYTI.QUANTITY) QUANTITY, sum(WRP.WEIGHT_GOODS) WEIGHT_GOODS from T_YARD_TALLY TYT left join T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM TYTI on TYT.id = TYTI.TALLY_ID left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI on TYTI.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID left join t_prd_work_plan tpwp on tpwp.id = TYT.plan_id left join t_bus_trust tbt on tbt.id = tpwp.trust_id left join t_bus_trust_cargo tbtc on (tbtc.cargo_info_id = TBCI.id and tbtc.trust_id = tpwp.trust_id) left join "WFG_PORTMIS_POUND".WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WRP on WRP.NOTE_ID = TYT.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID left join M_WORK_PROCESS MWPD on ( MWPD.PROCESS_CD = TYT.PROCESS_CODE and MWPD.NEW_PROCESS = '1') left join M_WORK_PROCESS MWP on MWP.ID = MWPD.PARENT_ID where TYT.del_flag != '1' and TYTI.id is not null and MWPD.NEW_PROCESS ='1' and TYT.PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT} group by TYTI.CARGO_INFO_ID, TYT.PROCESS_CODE,TYT.PROCESS_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, MWP.PROCESS_CD,MWP.PROCESS_NM,TBCI.CARGO_CODE, tbt.id,tbtc.id, tbt.trust_no, TYTI.SOURCE_OR_TARGET_FLAG

select TPDS.EQUIPMENT_NO, TPDS.EQUIPMENT_ID, MMT.MAC_TYPE_CODE EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, TPDS.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, TPDS.DEPT_NAME DEPT_NAME, WORK_PLAN_ID from T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY TPDS left join M_MACHINE_TYPE MMT on TPDS.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID = MMT.ID where TPDS.DISPATCH_TYPE = 1 and TPDS.dept_name = '固机队' and TPDS. WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id from sys_dept where dept_name = '固机队'
select plan_type from t_prd_work_plan where id = #{workPlanId}

select TPWP.PROCESS_CODE,TPWP.PROCESS_NAME, MWPD.PROCESS_CD PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE,MWPD.PROCESS_NM PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, tbtc.id trust_cargo_info_id, TBCI.CARGO_NAME||'/'||TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME||'/'||TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO CARGO_INFO_NAME, tbt.id trust_id,tbt.trust_no, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_CODE, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO,TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID from T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP left join t_bus_trust tbt on TPWP.trust_id = tbt.id left join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC on TBTC.TRUST_ID = TPWP.TRUST_ID left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI on TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID left join M_WORK_PROCESS MWP on MWP.PROCESS_CD = TPWP.PROCESS_CODE left join M_WORK_PROCESS MWPD on MWP.ID = MWPD.PARENT_ID where MWPD.NEW_PROCESS ='1' and TPWP.ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select * from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL where WORK_TICKET_ID = #{ticketId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select * from M_WORK_PROCESS where PROCESS_CD = #{processCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select id "deptId",DEPT_NAME "deptName" from SYS_DEPT SD
EXISTS ( select * from (
select #{deptName} as dept_Name from dual
) a where a.dept_Name = SD.DEPT_NAME )

select WRP.NOTE_ID ID,WRP.TRUCK_PLATE,wrp.WEIGH_OUT_DT,WRP.WEIGH_OUT_DT from T_YARD_TALLY TYT left join WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WRP on WRP.NOTE_ID= TYT.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID where TYT.DEL_FLAG ='0' and WRP.NOTE_ID is not null and WRP.WEIGH_OUT_DT is null and TYT.PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TBCI.CARGO_CODE "cargoCode",TBCI.PACKING_CODE "packingCode" from T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP left join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on TPWP.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID left join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC on TBT.id = TBTC.TRUST_ID left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI on TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID where TPWP.ID =#{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: delete from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT where id in ( select distinct TPWTD.ID from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT left join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD on TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID = TPWT.ID where TPWTD.ALLOT_TYPE in ('2') and TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.select:
select WORK_TICKET_ID,DEPT_ID,DEPT_NAME,PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, MWP.PROCESS_NM PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, WORK_POSITION_CODE,WORK_POSITION_NAME, MWP.IS_DIRECT_ACCESS, ALLOT_TYPE, DEPT_NAME "deptName", ton TICKET_TON, (select TO_CHAR(REGEXP_REPLACE(RTRIM(XMLCAST(XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT(E, to_char(EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME) || ',') ORDER BY EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME) AS CLOB), ','), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1')) from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT where WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID =TPWTD.ID group by WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID ) "equipmentTypeName"
from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD left join M_WORK_PROCESS MWP on MWP.PROCESS_CD = TPWTD.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE
where TPWTD.ALLOT_TYPE in ('2','3') and exists( select 1 from sys_dept sd where sd.IN_OUT_TYPE = 'O' and TPWTD.dept_id = sd.id ) and dept_name != '货主自卸'
and EXISTS ( select * from (
select #{ticketId} as tmp_id from dual
) a where a.tmp_id = TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID )

select TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID, TPWTD.DEPT_ID, TPWTD.DEPT_NAME, TPWTD.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, TPWTD.PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, DECODE(PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME,'下舱','01','苫盖','02','打堆','02',TPWTD.WORK_POSITION_CODE) WORK_POSITION_CODE, TPWTD.WORK_POSITION_NAME, TPWTD.DEPT_NAME "deptName", TPWTD.ton TICKET_TON, tmp_equ."equipmentTypeName" "equipmentTypeName", '辅助签票' allot_Type
from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT left join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD on TPWT.id = TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID left join (select WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID,TO_CHAR(REGEXP_REPLACE(RTRIM(XMLCAST(XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT(E, to_char(EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME) || ',') ORDER BY EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME) AS CLOB), ','), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1')) "equipmentTypeName" from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT group by WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID ) tmp_equ on tmp_equ.WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID =TPWTD.ID where EXISTS ( select * from (
select #{ticketId} as tmp_id from dual
) a where a.tmp_id = TPWT.id )

select case when TPWP.CLASS_CODE ='01' then TPWP.WORK_DATE + INTERVAL '8' HOUR + INTERVAL '30' MINUTE when TPWP.CLASS_CODE = '02' then TPWP.WORK_DATE + INTERVAL '19' HOUR + INTERVAL '30' MINUTE end as start_time, case when TPWP.CLASS_CODE ='01' then TPWP.WORK_DATE + INTERVAL '19' HOUR + INTERVAL '30' MINUTE when TPWP.CLASS_CODE = '02' then TPWP.WORK_DATE + INTERVAL '32' HOUR + INTERVAL '30' MINUTE end as end_time, TPWP.ID plan_id, TPWT.id ticket_Id, tbt.id trust_id from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT left join T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP on TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID left join T_BUS_TRUST tbt on TPWP.TRUST_ID = tbt.ID where TPWT.ID = #{workTicketId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update:
update T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL set EXTERNAL_STATUS = #{status}, EXTERNAL_PRD_BY= #{userBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXTERNAL_PRD_BY_NAME=#{userByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXTERNAL_PRD_TIME = #{userTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id in ( select distinct TPWTD.id from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD left join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT on TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID = TPWT.ID left join T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP on TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID where TPWP.PLAN_TYPE = '4' and to_date(to_char(TPWP.work_date,'yyyy-MM'),'yyyy-MM') = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
and DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL set EXTERNAL_STATUS = #{status}, EXTERNAL_HR_BY= #{userBy2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXTERNAL_HR_BY_NAME=#{userByName2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXTERNAL_HR_TIME = #{userTime2,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id in ( select distinct TPWTD.id from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD left join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT on TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID = TPWT.ID left join T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP on TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID where TPWP.PLAN_TYPE = '4' and to_date(to_char(TPWP.work_date,'yyyy-MM'),'yyyy-MM') = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
and DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select SD.ID"deptId",SD.DEPT_NAME "deptName",SD.ID "value",SD.DEPT_NAME "label" from SYS_DEPT SD join ( select DEPT_ID from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL where dept_name not in ('货主自卸','固机队','流机队','调度室') and dept_id is not null and dept_name is not null and CREATE_TIME >to_date('2024-10-01 00:00:00','yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') group by DEPT_ID ) tmp on tmp.DEPT_ID = SD.ID

select count(*) from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD where ALLOT_TYPE in ('2','3') and EXTERNAL_STATUS = '30' and to_char(TPWTD.WORK_DATE,'yyyy-MM') = to_char(#{workDate},'yyyy-MM') order by CREATE_TIME desc

select count(*) from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD left join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT on TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID = TPWT.ID left join T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP on TPWP.id =TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID where TPWP.PLAN_TYPE = '4' and TPWTD.ALLOT_TYPE = '1' and EXTERNAL_STATUS = '30' and to_char(TPWTD.WORK_DATE,'yyyy-MM') = to_char(#{workDate},'yyyy-MM')

SELECT ID , DEPT_NAME "deptName", IN_OUT_TYPE_LABEL FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_NAME,DEPT_LEVEL,case IN_OUT_TYPE WHEN 'I' THEN '内部' ELSE '外部' END IN_OUT_TYPE_LABEL FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = ( SELECT A1.DEPT_ID FROM SYS_USER A1 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT A2 ON A2. ID = A1.DEPT_ID WHERE A1. ID = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )) CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID=ID) WHERE DEPT_LEVEL = '2'
mapper.delete: delete from T_PRD_WF_SETTLEMENT where IS_DAOYUN = '0' and to_char(SETTLEMENT_DATE,'yyyy-MM') = to_char(#{workDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},'yyyy-MM')
delete from T_PRD_WF_SETTLEMENT where IS_DAOYUN = '1' and to_char(SETTLEMENT_DATE,'yyyy-MM') = #{workDate}
mapper.select: SELECT A2.ID,A2.DEPT_NAME,A2.DEPT_LEVEL,case A2.IN_OUT_TYPE WHEN 'I' THEN '内部' ELSE '外部' END IN_OUT_TYPE_LABEL FROM SYS_USER A1 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT A2 ON A2. ID = A1.DEPT_ID WHERE A1. ID = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
